revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:葦稲葉神社); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/31113108 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:葦稲葉神社 | revid=31113108 --> == 改名提案 == 鹿江比賣神社は葦稲葉神社に合祀されているらしいので、記事名としては[[葦稲葉神社]]の方がいいかと思います。なお、跡地は大麻比古神社境内社もあるので両者への案内を兼ねて曖昧さ回避頁にしようかと思います。ご意見お願いします。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月5日 (金) 15:59 (UTC) *[[鹿江比賣神社]]から「葦稲葉神社」へ改名しました。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月20日 (土) 10:31 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/31113108 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:葦稲葉神社 | revid=31113108 --> == 改名提案 == 鹿江比賣神社は葦稲葉神社に合祀されているらしいので、記事名としては[[葦稲葉神社]]の方がいいかと思います。なお、跡地は大麻比古神社境内社もあるので両者への案内を兼ねて曖昧さ回避頁にしようかと思います。ご意見お願いします。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月5日 (金) 15:59 (UTC) *[[鹿江比賣神社]]から「葦稲葉神社」へ改名しました。--[[利用者:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月20日 (土) 10:31 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q11621139]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/31113108 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:葦稲葉神社 | revid=31113108 --> == 改名提案 == 鹿江比賣神社は葦稲葉神社に合祀されているらしいので、記事名としては[[葦稲葉神社]]の方がいいかと思います。なお、跡地は大麻比古神社境内社もあるので両者への案内を兼ねて曖昧さ回避頁にしようかと思います。ご意見お願いします。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月5日 (金) 15:59 (UTC) *[[鹿江比賣神社]]から「葦稲葉神社」へ改名しました。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月20日 (土) 10:31 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q11621139]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ashiinaba_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Ashiinaba_Shrine for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/31113108 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:葦稲葉神社 | revid=31113108 --> == 改名提案 == 鹿江比賣神社は葦稲葉神社に合祀されているらしいので、記事名としては[[葦稲葉神社]]の方がいいかと思います。なお、跡地は大麻比古神社境内社もあるので両者への案内を兼ねて曖昧さ回避頁にしようかと思います。ご意見お願いします。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月5日 (金) 15:59 (UTC) *[[鹿江比賣神社]]から「葦稲葉神社」へ改名しました。--[[User:胡亂堂|胡亂堂]] 2010年3月20日 (土) 10:31 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC) ==This page was generated from Wikidata== This page was originally generated programmatically from [[d:Q11621139]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 20:20, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
